face.structure: oval with a pronounced jawline and cheekbones

details: a golden fleck in the left eye
eyes.expression_effect: a glint of sarcasm and quick wit

face.expression: a subtle smirk often gracing his lips, hinting at mischief

skin.texture: smooth with a hint of youthful glow
skin.rendering_notes: gentle gradient shading with emphasis around the temples and cheeks for depth

hair.style: tousled and slightly wavy at the top, tapering towards the sides
hair.flow: combed back but naturally falling in playful strands around the forehead
details: occasional highlights caught under bright light

character.aura: an air of sincere confidence with undertones of playful nonchalance

outfit.base: sleek, dark bomber jacket over a fitted, light gray t-shirt
outfit.design: minimalist with subtle geometrical stitching on the jacket shoulders
outfit.fit: tailored yet relaxed, allowing ease of movement

composition.framing: mid-shot focusing on the upper torso and face
composition.pose: standing slightly sideways with one shoulder forward
composition.gesture: casual slouch with hands tucked into pockets, head slightly turned towards camera

background.color_palette: cool blues and grays punctuated with warm streetlights
background.details: subtle blur of passing crowds and distant skyline
background.rules: keep the background unfocused to highlight the character
